section.h2: Top played tracks from the last month

section.div: Favorites genres: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Drama, Romance

div.div: Made in Abyss: Retsujitsu no Ougonkyou
Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Horror, Mystery, Sci-Fi

The second season of Made in Abyss. Directly after the events of Made in Abyss: Fukaki Tamashii no Reimei, the third installment of Made in Abyss covers the adventures of Reg, Riko, and Nanachi in the Sixth Layer, The Capital of the Unreturned. Note: The last episode aired with a runtime of ~48 minutes as opposed to the standard 24 minute long episode.

Hello Kitty and other Sanrio characters star in adaptations of various fairy tales from all over the world. This entry contains: 1. Hello kitty no Shirayukihime / Hello Kitty in "Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs" (ハローキティの白雪姫) 2. Bad Badtz-maru no Ookami ga Kita! / Badtz-Maru in "The Shepherd Boy and the Wolf" (バッドばつ丸のオオカミが来た！) 3. Pochakko no Jack to Mame no ki / Pochacco in "Jack and the Beanstalk" (ポチャッコのジャックと豆の木) 4. Hello Kitty no Susama no Mimi wa Roba no Mimi / Hello Kitty & Mimmy in "The Story of King Midas" (ハローキティの王様の耳はロバの耳) 5. Hello Kitty no Hansel to Gretel / Hello Kitty & Dear Daniel in "Hansel & Gretel" (ハローキティのヘンゼルとグレーテル) 6. My Melody no Akazukin / My Melody in "Little Red Riding Hood" (マイメロディの赤ずきん) 7. Hello Kitty no Kaguya-Hime / Hello Kitty in "The Bamboo Princess" (ハローキティのかぐや姫) 8. Hangyodon no Hadaka no Ousama / Hangyodon in "The Emperor's New Clothes" (ハンギョドンのはだかの王様) 9. Hello Kitty no Nemureru Mori no Bijo / Hello Kitty in "Sleeping Beauty" (ハローキティのねむれる森の美女) 10. Bad Badtz-Maru no Ari to Kirigirisu / Badtz-Maru in "The Ants and the Grasshopper" (バッドばつ丸のアリとキリギリス) 11. Hello Kitty no Hakuchou no Ouji / Hello Kitty in "The Wild Swans" (ハローキティの白鳥の王子) 12. O Saru no Monkichi no Kin no Ono Gin no Ono / Monkichi in "Mercury and the Workmen" (おさるのもんきちの金の斧 銀の斧) 13. Hello Kitty no Kurumiwari Ningyou / Hello Kitty in "The Nutcracker" (ハローキティのくるみ割り人形) 14. Corocorokuririn no Inaka no Nezumi Tokai no Nezumi / Corocorokuririn in "The Country Mouse and the Town Mouse" (コロコロクリリンの田舎のネズミ都会のネズミ) 15. Hello Kitty no Momotarou / Hello Kitty in "Momotaro" (ハローキティの桃太郎) 16. Pompompurin no Usagi to Kame / Pompompurin in "The Tortoise and the Hare" (ポムポムプリンのウサギとカメ) 17. Hello Kitty no Cinderella / Hello Kitty in "Cinderella" (ハローキティのシンデレラ) 18. Ahiru no Pekkle no Ahiru no Drakestail / Pekkle in "Drakestail" (アヒルのペックルのアヒルのドレイクステール) 19. Kero Kero Keroppi no Arajin to Mahou no Ranpu / Keroppi in "Aladdin and the Magic Lamp" (けろけろけろっぴのアラジンと魔法のランプ) 20. Hello Kitty no Match Uri no Shoujo / Hello Kitty in "The Little Match Girl" (ハローキティのマッチ売りの少女) 21. Hello Kitty no Nagagutsu o Haita Neko / Hello Kitty in "Puss in Boots" (ハローキティの長靴をはいた猫) 22. Ahiru no Pekkle no Minikui Ahiru no ko / Pekkle in "The Ugly Duckling" (アヒルのペックルのみにくいアヒルの子) 23. Hello Kitty no o Yayu bi Hime / Hello Kitty in "Thumbelina" (ハローキティのおやゆび姫) 24. Pompompurin no Kitakaze to Taiyou / Pompompurin in "The North Wind and the Sun" (ポムポムプリンの北風と太陽) 25. Hello Kitty no Yuki no Joou / Hello Kitty & Dear Daniel in "The Snow Queen" (ハローキティの雪の女王) 26. Hello Kitty no 3 Hiki no ko Buta / Hello Kitty, Mimmy, & Dear Daniel in "The Three Little Pigs" (ハローキティの3匹の子ぶた)
Tensei gotoki de Nigerareru to demo, Nii-san?

The older brother, imprisoned by his sister, dies just as he escapes and is reincarnated in another world! He thought he had been freed from his demonic sister, but now she too has been reincarnated in the same world...?
Tensei Shitara Dai Nana Ouji Datta node, Kimamani Majutsu wo Kiwamemasu
Adventure, Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life

Prince Lloyd wasn't always a prince...in fact, his previous life is one he remembers perfectly: he was a sorcerer, of sorts. So when he was forced to reincarnate, he decided to continue his studies, prince of the realm or no! But his new life has its own sets of challenges...including being a 10-year-old! What's the 7th prince/sorcerer to do?!

(Source: Kodansha USA)
How do you use Aeron MDS with multiple publishers and a single subscriber where the publishers are unaware of the subscriber machine IPs?

I am trying to use Aeron Multi-Destination-Subscriptions where I have multiple publishers publish messages to their own IP address and port. I want a subscriber to subscribe to each of the publishers IP addresses and PORTs on the same stream ID. The publishers and subscribers are on separate machines. For simplicity, I'm testing this with a single Publisher and Subscriber setup. I am using docker to create a virtual network so I can designate the IPs of the publisher and subscriber machines. Here is my example code: Publication code final String publicationChannel = new ChannelUriStringBuilder() .media(UDP_MEDIA) (3 more lines were trimmed) Subscription code final String subscriptionChannel = new ChannelUriStringBuilder() .media(UDP_MEDIA) (8 more lines were trimmed) I have a doWork in both of these which repeatedly call subscription.isConnected() and publication.isConnected(). I expected this to work just like the MDC example where you can use control-mode=manual on the publication side and call publication.addDestination(subscriberIP:port) where the subscription would be setup to subscribe to its own subscriberIP:port. In testing, the publication and subscription are not connected. This test class in the aeron repo uses MDS over UDP using localhost and using multicast addresses MDSTest so I thought the same would hold true for using the publisher machines IP and port. Would really appreciate if someone could explain why this doesn't work?
